metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.02] These sounds fall into my mind
[00:03.75] These sounds fall into my mind
[00:07.89] I can get down, I can get lonely
[00:11.33] Every time I think about the highs, yeah
[00:15.39] Messed me around and now you keep calling
[00:18.85] Wonderin' if you can make it right
[00:22.06] I told you it's the end for you and I
[00:26.71] Swear this time we're through, but it's a lie
[00:30.58] When you call my name, yeah, ooh
[00:33.77] That sounds so right, so right, so right
[00:38.09] Deep down, wishing you were mine
[00:41.71] Deep down, miss you all the time
[00:45.50] Dream 'bout what we could've been if we tried, oh
[00:49.32] But deep down, wishing you were mine, were mine
[00:53.09] Deep down, you got me so
[00:55.16] Deep down, I wanna go
[00:57.12] Deep down, you got me so, yeah
[01:00.83] Deep down, you got me so
[01:02.75] Deep down, I wanna go
[01:04.50] Deep down, you got me so, yeah
[01:08.41] Yeah, need to be strong (mm) as soon as I see ya (see ya)
[01:12.24] You can turn my tables back around so easy
[01:16.20] You got the control (control), just hearin' you speak
[01:19.45] Just gets me kinda crazy, kinda foolish, foolish, yeah
[01:23.02] I told you it's the end for you and I
[01:27.47] Swear this time we're through, but it's a lie
[01:31.41] When you call my name, yeah, ooh
[01:34.73] That sounds so right, so right, so right
[01:38.82] Deep down, wishing you were mine
[01:42.73] Deep down, miss you all the time
[01:46.61] Dream 'bout what we could've been if we tried, oh
[01:50.04] But deep down, wishing you were mine, were mine
[01:54.92] 
[01:57.98] (Deep down, miss you all the time)
[02:01.80] Dream 'bout what we could've been if we tried, oh
[02:05.38] 'Cause deep down, wishing you were mine, were mine
[02:09.48] Deep down, you got me so
[02:11.25] Deep down, wishing you were mine (woo)

[02:18.99] Dream 'bout what we could've been if we tried, oh (if we tried)
